Name: Environment
Description: An RF propagation context — terrain, obstacles, noise — that determines how signal degrades with distance.

Attributes.Name: Path Loss Exponent
Attributes.Description: n in PL = PL₀ + 10·n·log₁₀(d/d₀). Free space = 2.

Attributes.Name: Reference Path Loss (dB)
Attributes.Description: Path loss at the reference distance for ~900 MHz

Attributes.Name: Shadow Fading σ (dB)
Attributes.Description: Log-normal sigma — produces honest p10/p50/p90 spread
